tier_1.title: Sucking Mud
tier_1.description: The ground gives way. One wrong step and you're thigh-deep in mire.
tier_1.success: You test the ground with a pole and find the solid path.
tier_1.failure: Hours pulling each other free. Half a day gone.

tier_1.title: Giant Leeches
tier_1.description: The water ripples. Something large and dark surfaces.
tier_1.success: You spot them and take the dry ridge instead.
tier_1.failure: They latch on before anyone notices.

tier_1.title: Bog Berries
tier_1.description: Clusters of dark berries grow on low bushes at the water's edge.
tier_1.success: Edible, tart, and plentiful. Good haul.
tier_1.failure: They look similar to poisonous ones. Better not risk it.

tier_2.title: Will-o'-Wisps
tier_2.description: Pale lights dance over the water, drifting away from the path.
tier_2.success: You know the trick. Follow the moss, not the lights.
tier_2.failure: The party follows the lights into a dead end. A full day lost.

tier_2.title: Lizardfolk Hunters
tier_2.description: Scaled figures watch from the reeds, spears ready.
tier_2.success: You spot their sentries and negotiate passage with trade goods.
tier_2.failure: They attack. This is their hunting ground.

tier_3.title: Hag of the Murkmere
tier_3.description: A hunched figure stirs a cauldron on a moss-draped islet. She has noticed you. The swamp feels like it's holding its breath.
tier_3.success: You resist the pull of her offer. A will of iron keeps the party moving without cost.
tier_3.failure: Her bargain sinks in. Someone accepts. The price is paid in days and secrets.
tier_3.notes: On failure the DM may trigger a WIS save (DC 14) for the player who spoke first.

tier_3.title: Methane Vent Field
tier_3.description: Bubbles burst across the water's surface. The air stings your eyes. One spark would be catastrophic.
tier_3.success: You cover flames and hold breath. The field is crossed safely.
tier_3.failure: A lantern tips. The gas ignites in a rolling boom. Supplies burn.

tier_4.title: Black Dragon's Demesne
tier_4.description: The water has turned to acid-tinged sludge. Bleached bones jut from the mire. The dragon's lair mouth yawns beneath an overhang of dead trees.
tier_4.success: You time the dragon's patrol, slip past the lair entrance, and emerge on solid ground.
tier_4.failure: The shadow falls before the warning is spoken. The dragon rises from the water.
tier_4.notes: On success the party may choose to enter the lair as a dungeon encounter instead of bypassing.
